allow: Bash(New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force raw/articles, raw/papers, raw/repos, raw/transcripts, raw/data, raw/assets, wiki/sources, wiki/entities, wiki/concepts, wiki/comparisons, wiki/syntheses, .claude/skills)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\RSTAdmin\\Documents\\Gajumaru Wiki"; try { $word = New-Object -ComObject Word.Application; $word.Visible = $false; $doc = $word.Documents.Open\(\(Resolve-Path "raw/articles/Gajumaru Un-White Paper 26-03-31.pdf"\).Path\); $text = $doc.Content.Text; $doc.Close\($false\); $word.Quit\(\); $text | Select-Object -First 10000 } catch { "Word COM failed: $_" })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\RSTAdmin\\Documents\\Gajumaru Wiki"; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("raw/articles/Gajumaru Un-White Paper 26-03-31.pdf"\); $ascii = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($bytes\); $words = [regex]::Matches\($ascii, '[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9 .,;:!?\(\)\\-\\'']{15,}'\); \($words | ForEach-Object { $_.Value.Trim\(\) } | Where-Object { $_ -match '[aeiou]' -and \($_.Split\(' '\).Count -gt 2\) } | Select-Object -First 300\) -join "`n")
PowerShell(python -c "import pdfplumber; print\('pdfplumber OK'\)" 2>&1; python -c "import pypdf; print\('pypdf OK'\)" 2>&1; python -c "import pdfminer; print\('pdfminer OK'\)" 2>&1)
